LlamaIndex vs LangChain: What's the difference?
LlamaIndex
and
LangChain
are two platforms that facilitate the creation and implementation of
retrieval-augmented generation
(RAG) systems. LlamaIndex is built for streamlined search-and-retrieval, while LangChain is a versatile, modular platform supporting numerous use
